name: Grounding Workflow
description: Promotes the PROMPTING.md ground-before-edit loop: describe the scene / read the file before any edit, iterate transiently, validate shaders, then persist. Matched on grounding + scene + edit keywords.
plan: Before editing the scene, ground yourself: call triangle_describe_scene (and triangle_capture_screenshot when framing matters) so you target the right object by name/uuid. For code edits, call triangle_project_tree / triangle_read_file first. Iterate transiently with the set_* tools to dial in a value visually, then persist the winner to source with triangle_write_file. Validate shaders with triangle_validate_shader before writing GLSL. After heavy work, take a triangle_performance_snapshot to catch regressions. Name targets precisely — get the name/uuid from describe_scene before calling set_*.
